title: #44 - The British Amigas: First day in Salerno

blocks.text: July 2nd
Dear loyal campanions.

I have failed to post every day. I'm still currently in Italy and I'm having less and less time to write. The writing is the easy past but making these posts with images in the phone takes a long time.
to speed things up I will upload photos first of the day and texts as separate parts. And the writing might be more rough and brief.
Pictures first for today then a write up of the events 🙂 Enjoyyy.

blocks.caption: Waking up in the morning at the river
First time eating pizza in italia
A beach soccer game where I made many friends
Two British friends from London who I met at soccer
We went out to eat dinner . Gnocchi!!
Beautiful wall art in the city.
We stayed up till 5:30 am- sun was rising
They let me sleep on the floor of the Airbnb. Thank you!! ❤️

blocks.text: Great now for the write up :)
I had a very flat roads and hot biking into Salerno on busier roads. It was much cooler in the mountains.
But then I got to the city and it's beautiful.
Again I always need time for the small town to big city transition. Im always uncomfortable at first in the big cities for how many people there are and the traffic.
It takes me at least a day to get used it again.
I did not know what to do. I wanted to chill so I found a bar and had espresso and recharged. I create a little plan for what I would do.
Then I biked to the beat and a soccer game was on. A beach league.
I met two British women from London.
We all talked together for a while. We decided we would go out for dinner together later and drinks. They left to get ready and I stayed at the beach where all my stuff was.
There was a beach shower which was awesome to use and get clean with.
Then I talked with the Italians beside me. They told me about the history of the beach soccer. It was a 40 year old tradition in the city.
They then bought me beers and we talked for a long while while the game was going on.
After the game we parted ways and I met the girls to go for dinner. We found a place and ate gnocchi. Great conversation and lots of drinks.
They paid for my dinner! (Thank you so much ❤️❤️❤️❤️)

We kept drinking till 5 am. Then they felt bad for me and let me sleep on the floor of their AirBNB instead of sleeping on the beach. I mean at 5 am when we finish the sun was already up and rising. So really it was an all nighter.
We drank alot
They can really drink! It was impressive to seee. The English.
It was a fun night in Salerno!
Night accommodations ( you day's it above)
This was more brief. Did it still do the job? I think this style is more sustainable for me right now.
Let me know what you think.
Bye for now,
Erik
